calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

William Weiss, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Barbara Harris, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Tony Saunders aka Anthony Washington.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $32,000.00
Fees and Costs by memo of costs.
Total - $32,000.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
